name: Supply-Chain Audit
description: Inventory of installed software signatures + a check against known compromised package patterns. Tuned for engineering laptops where the npm / PyPI / Homebrew supply chain is the primary attack surface. Stub plugin set at v0 — expands once the underlying maccrabctl supply-chain hooks land in the platform.

plugins.role: Baseline /etc/hosts — supply-chain attacks have used hosts entries to redirect package mirrors
